creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
I am working on a major update to the zabbix ports, which includes =
version 1.8, splitting off zabbix-1.6 (for those who can't upgrade yet), =
and breaking the current zabbix port into separate ports for the server, =
proxy, and frontend.  I am doing final testing right now and hope to =
submit the update very shortly.
